dialogues: People collect data about all kinds of things. Look at these three tables. Which data would have to use Scale of 2?
Right. The coin counts: 7, 12, 19, 23. None of them end in 0 or 5, so Scale of 2 is the only way to show them exactly.
Here's a quick check: Do all the numbers end in 0 or 5? If yes, you have options. If no and the numbers are small, Scale of 2 is your go-to.
